name: Tuna and Cheese Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tuna, mayonnaise, shredded cheese, hard-boiled egg, onion, stuffed green olives (if using), and sweet pickle relish in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Spoon the mixture into each of the hamburger buns.
3. Wrap each bun in a paper towel to prevent condensation from making the bottom soggy.
4. Place the buns in the microwave.
5. Cook on HIGH for 1 to 2 minutes, or until the cheese has melted and softened into the mixture. If using cold tuna, allow additional cooking time.
